subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God, O God of the world and Desire of the nations! How can I make mention of Thee, when I am certain that remembrance hath [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا اله العالم و مقصود الامم کیف اذکرک بعد ایقانی بان الذکر قد
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for forgiveness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
